tests.description: html,body includes overscroll-behavior: none to prevent pull-to-refresh and rubber-banding
steps: Assert the html/body rule block contains overscroll-behavior: none

tests.description: #app includes touch-action: none to prevent unintended browser gestures
steps: Assert the #app rule block contains touch-action: none
tests.acceptance_criteria: Dynamic viewport height changes do not leave permanent blank bars

tests.description: .eavi-info-overlay uses safe-area-inset padding on all four sides
steps: Assert the .eavi-info-overlay rule block contains safe-area-inset-top
Assert the .eavi-info-overlay rule block contains safe-area-inset-right
Assert the .eavi-info-overlay rule block contains safe-area-inset-bottom
Assert the .eavi-info-overlay rule block contains safe-area-inset-left
tests.acceptance_criteria: UI respects safe-area insets (top/bottom) where applicable

tests.description: index.html viewport meta includes viewport-fit=cover (re-verify from US-028)
steps: Assert viewport meta tag contains viewport-fit=cover
tests.acceptance_criteria: Viewport meta config supports edge-to-edge displays

tests.description: html,body overflow is hidden (re-verify no scrollbars)
steps: Assert the html/body rule block contains overflow: hidden

tests.description: html,body uses 100dvh with 100vh fallback for dynamic viewport sizing
tests.acceptance_criteria: Dynamic viewport height changes do not leave permanent blank bars

tests.description: .eavi-info-close respects safe-area-inset-top so close button is not hidden behind notch
steps: Assert the overlay or panel area accounts for safe-area-inset-top (covered by T-037-03 overlay padding which pushes content including close button away from notch)
tests.acceptance_criteria: UI respects safe-area insets (top/bottom) where applicable

setup: Read src/style.css and index.html once at the top of the describe block using readFileSync
pattern: Static file analysis with regex assertions matching the existing US-028 viewport-css.test.ts pattern
